# Split pre-composition mixing coefficients

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_deepseek_manual.py; do not edit. -->

This multi-head composition translation expresses mixing, normalization, and recompute stages as tile dataflow.

| --- | --- |
| Upstream module | [`tile_kernels/mhc/pre_split_mixes_kernel.py`](https://github.com/deepseek-ai/TileKernels/blob/36d9e45d38e204ebb87e6f6e833821eee0482fe5/tile_kernels/mhc/pre_split_mixes_kernel.py) |

| Verification | `source-validated` |
| Minimum thread fragment | 128 bytes |

## Core C++ kernel

```cpp title="pre_split_mixes_pto.hpp" linenums="1"
template <typename TileT>
inline void sigmoid(TileT &out, const TileT &x) {
    using namespace pto;
    TileT neg, ex, denom;
    TMULS(neg, x, -1.0f);
    TEXP(ex, neg);
    TADDS(denom, ex, 1.0f);
    TRECIP(out, denom);
}
```

## Algorithm walkthrough

Load hidden-state and coefficient panels, compose matrix, reduction, and pointwise operations, and write the resulting head or gradient panel.

## Source-to-intrinsic mapping

[`TADD`](../../../intrinsics/tadd.md), [`TADDS`](../../../intrinsics/tadds.md), [`TCOLEXPAND`](../../../intrinsics/tcolexpand.md), [`TEXP`](../../../intrinsics/texp.md), [`TEXPANDS`](../../../intrinsics/texpands.md), [`TLOAD`](../../../intrinsics/tload.md), [`TMUL`](../../../intrinsics/tmul.md), [`TMULS`](../../../intrinsics/tmuls.md), [`TRECIP`](../../../intrinsics/trecip.md), [`TROWEXPAND`](../../../intrinsics/trowexpand.md), [`TSTORE`](../../../intrinsics/tstore.md), [`TSUBS`](../../../intrinsics/tsubs.md)

Scalar C++ controls dimensions, loop bounds, and tile coordinates. Tensor
values remain in global tensor views and typed tiles throughout the data path.

## Block and thread partition

Blocks partition the outer token range; threads partition head or hidden dimensions into disjoint fragments of at least 128 bytes.

## Memory and tile flow

Global panels enter local tiles, matrix and reduction stages produce typed intermediates, and block-shared tiles are used when a value must be visible across the group.

## Build and verification

Run the migration gate from the repository root:

```console
python3 scripts/verify_deepseek_migration.py
```

The verification label records the strongest completed gate. A
`source-validated` page is a valid API example even when compiler lowering
for one of its public intrinsics is not yet available.

## Complete translated source

??? code "pre_split_mixes_pto.hpp"

    ```cpp title="pre_split_mixes_pto.hpp" linenums="1"
    #ifndef SUPERNPU_MHC_PRE_SPLIT_MIXES_PTO_HPP
    #define SUPERNPU_MHC_PRE_SPLIT_MIXES_PTO_HPP

    #include <common/pto_tileop.hpp>
    #include <cstddef>
    #include <cstdint>

    namespace supernpu::tile_isa {
    namespace mhc_pre_split_detail {

    template <typename TileT>
    inline void sigmoid(TileT &out, const TileT &x) {
        using namespace pto;
        TileT neg, ex, denom;
        TMULS(neg, x, -1.0f);
        TEXP(ex, neg);
        TADDS(denom, ex, 1.0f);
        TRECIP(out, denom);
    }

    }

    template <int NumTokens, int MhcMult = 4, int TileN = 16>
    void mhc_pre_split_mixes_fwd(float *input_mixes,
                                 const float *mhc_scale,
                                 const float *mhc_base,
                                 float *pre_layer_mix,
                                 float *post_layer_mix,
                                 float *comb_res_mix,
                                 float mhc_post_mult_value,
                                 float mhc_pre_eps) {
        static_assert(MhcMult == 4, "source-level port maps MHC=4 into physical 8-wide tiles");
        static_assert(TileN * 8 * static_cast<int>(sizeof(float)) >= 128, "mix tile must be >=128B");
        constexpr int kMhc2 = MhcMult * MhcMult;
        constexpr int kMhc3 = MhcMult * 2 + kMhc2;
        (void)TileN;

        using namespace pto;
        using tile4 = LocalTile< float, 4, 8, BLayout::RowMajor, 1, MhcMult>;
        using tile8 = LocalTile< float, 4, 8, BLayout::RowMajor, 1, 8>;

        for (int n = 0; n < NumTokens; ++n) {
            tile4 pre_raw, post_raw, pre_scale_c, post_scale_c, pre_base_c, post_base_c;
            tile4 pre_scale, post_scale, pre_base, post_base, pre_aff, post_aff, pre_sig, post_sig, pre_out, post_out;
            TLOAD(pre_scale_c, mhc_scale);
            TLOAD(post_scale_c, mhc_scale + 1);
            TLOAD(pre_base_c, mhc_base);
            TLOAD(post_base_c, mhc_base + MhcMult);
            TLOAD(pre_raw, input_mixes + n * kMhc3);
            TLOAD(post_raw, input_mixes + n * kMhc3 + MhcMult);
            TCOLEXPAND(pre_scale, pre_scale_c);
            TROWEXPAND(pre_scale, pre_scale);
            TCOLEXPAND(post_scale, post_scale_c);
            TROWEXPAND(post_scale, post_scale);
            TCOLEXPAND(pre_base, pre_base_c);
            TCOLEXPAND(post_base, post_base_c);
            TMUL(pre_aff, pre_raw, pre_scale);
            TADD(pre_aff, pre_aff, pre_base);
            TMUL(post_aff, post_raw, post_scale);
            TADD(post_aff, post_aff, post_base);
            mhc_pre_split_detail::sigmoid(pre_sig, pre_aff);
            mhc_pre_split_detail::sigmoid(post_sig, post_aff);
            TADDS(pre_out, pre_sig, mhc_pre_eps);
            TMULS(post_out, post_sig, mhc_post_mult_value);
            TSTORE(pre_layer_mix + n * MhcMult, pre_out);
            TSTORE(post_layer_mix + n * MhcMult, post_out);

            for (int tc = 0; tc < kMhc2 / 8; ++tc) {
                tile8 raw, scale_c, scale_full, base_c, base_full, affine;
                TLOAD(scale_c, mhc_scale + 2);
                TLOAD(base_c, mhc_base + MhcMult * 2 + tc * 8);
                TLOAD(raw, input_mixes + n * kMhc3 + MhcMult * 2 + tc * 8);
                TCOLEXPAND(scale_full, scale_c);
                TROWEXPAND(scale_full, scale_full);
                TCOLEXPAND(base_full, base_c);
                TMUL(affine, raw, scale_full);
                TADD(affine, affine, base_full);
                TSTORE(comb_res_mix + n * kMhc2 + tc * 8, affine);
            }
        }
    }

    template <int NumTokens, int MhcMult = 4, int TileN = 16>
    void mhc_pre_split_mixes_bwd(float *pre_layer_mix_grad,
                                 float *post_layer_mix_grad,
                                 float *comb_res_mix_grad,
                                 float *input_mixes,
                                 float *post_layer_mix,
                                 const float *mhc_scale,
                                 const float *mhc_base,
                                 float *input_mixes_grad,
                                 float *mhc_scale_grad_partial,
                                 float *mhc_base_grad_partial,
                                 float mhc_post_mult_value) {
        static_assert(MhcMult == 4, "source-level port maps MHC=4 into physical 8-wide tiles");
        static_assert(TileN * 8 * static_cast<int>(sizeof(float)) >= 128, "mix tile must be >=128B");
        constexpr int kMhc2 = MhcMult * MhcMult;
        constexpr int kMhc3 = MhcMult * 2 + kMhc2;
        (void)TileN;

        using namespace pto;
        using tile4 = LocalTile< float, 4, 8, BLayout::RowMajor, 1, MhcMult>;
        using tile8 = LocalTile< float, 4, 8, BLayout::RowMajor, 1, 8>;
        using tile_s = LocalTile< float, 4, 8, BLayout::RowMajor, 1, 3>;

        tile_s scale_grad, base_grad3;
        TEXPANDS(scale_grad, 0.0f);
        TEXPANDS(base_grad3, 0.0f);
        for (int n = 0; n < NumTokens; ++n) {
            tile4 pre_raw, pre_aff, pre_sig, pre_go, pre_deriv, pre_ig;
            tile4 post_go, post_val, post_sig, post_deriv, post_ig;
            TLOAD(pre_raw, input_mixes + n * kMhc3);
            TLOAD(pre_go, pre_layer_mix_grad + n * MhcMult);
            tile4 pre_scale_c, pre_scale, pre_base_c, pre_base;
            TLOAD(pre_scale_c, mhc_scale);
            TLOAD(pre_base_c, mhc_base);
            TCOLEXPAND(pre_scale, pre_scale_c);
            TROWEXPAND(pre_scale, pre_scale);
            TCOLEXPAND(pre_base, pre_base_c);
            TMUL(pre_aff, pre_raw, pre_scale);
            TADD(pre_aff, pre_aff, pre_base);
            mhc_pre_split_detail::sigmoid(pre_sig, pre_aff);
            TSUBS(pre_deriv, pre_sig, 1.0f);
            TMULS(pre_deriv, pre_deriv, -1.0f);
            TMUL(pre_deriv, pre_deriv, pre_sig);
            TMUL(pre_ig, pre_go, pre_deriv);
            TSTORE(input_mixes_grad + n * kMhc3, pre_ig);

            TLOAD(post_go, post_layer_mix_grad + n * MhcMult);
            TLOAD(post_val, post_layer_mix + n * MhcMult);
            TMULS(post_sig, post_val, 1.0f / mhc_post_mult_value);
            TSUBS(post_deriv, post_sig, 1.0f);
            TMULS(post_deriv, post_deriv, -1.0f);
            TMUL(post_deriv, post_deriv, post_sig);
            TMUL(post_ig, post_go, post_deriv);
            TSTORE(input_mixes_grad + n * kMhc3 + MhcMult, post_ig);

            for (int tc = 0; tc < kMhc2 / 8; ++tc) {
                tile8 cg, cig;
                TLOAD(cg, comb_res_mix_grad + n * kMhc2 + tc * 8);
                tile8 scale_c, scale_full;
                TLOAD(scale_c, mhc_scale + 2);
                TCOLEXPAND(scale_full, scale_c);
                TROWEXPAND(scale_full, scale_full);
                TMUL(cig, cg, scale_full);
                TSTORE(input_mixes_grad + n * kMhc3 + MhcMult * 2 + tc * 8, cig);
            }
        }

        using it_s = global_iterator<global_tensor<float, RowMajor<1, 3>>, tile_s>;
        auto gsg = it_s(mhc_scale_grad_partial)(0, 0);
        auto gbg = it_s(mhc_base_grad_partial)(0, 0);
        TSTORE(gsg, scale_grad);
        TSTORE(gbg, base_grad3);
        (void)mhc_base;
    }

    }
    #endif
    ```
